nasb.text: If therefore your whole body is full of light, with no dark part in it, it will be wholly illumined, as when the lamp illumines you with its rays.”

esv.text: If then your whole body is full of light, having no part dark, it will be wholly bright, as when a lamp with its rays gives you light.”

cnv.text: 你若全身明亮，沒有一點黑暗，你就完全明亮，好像明亮的燈光照你一樣。”

ccb.text: 如果你全身光明、毫无黑暗，你整个人就熠熠生辉，好像有灯光照在你身上。”

csbs.text: 因此，如果你全身光明，没有任何黑暗的部分，你就全然光明，好像明灯照亮着你。”
